raw:
{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.2": 4, "RX.1": 3, "RX.3": 3, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The review identifies several logical inconsistencies in the RoboJudge pipeline and raises valid concerns about its reliance on a scene description that may be biased or incomplete.",
    "RX.1": "The review acknowledges uncertainty regarding the robustness of the scene description and potential biases in the LLM-based evaluation.",
    "RX.3": "The review highlights the need for more transparency regarding the exact nature of the scene description and its potential limitations in capturing all relevant aspects of the rollout.",
    "RX.4": "The review does not identify any harmful content or regressions introduced by RoboJudge, but it raises concerns about potential biases and the need for further analysis.",
    "RX.5": "The review criticizes the lack of traceability for non-cosmetic changes in the scene description, suggesting that the pipeline lacks sufficient provenance information."
  },
  "confidence": {"R1.2": 0.9, "RX.1": 0.8, "RX.3": 0.7, "RX.4": 0.95, "RX.5": 0.6},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The review identifies several logical inconsistencies in the RoboJudge pipeline and raises valid concerns about its reliance on a scene description that may be biased or incomplete.
rationale.RX.1: The review acknowledges uncertainty regarding the robustness of the scene description and potential biases in the LLM-based evaluation.
rationale.RX.3: The review highlights the need for more transparency regarding the exact nature of the scene description and its potential limitations in capturing all relevant aspects of the rollout.
rationale.RX.4: The review does not identify any harmful content or regressions introduced by RoboJudge, but it raises concerns about potential biases and the need for further analysis.
rationale.RX.5: The review criticizes the lack of traceability for non-cosmetic changes in the scene description, suggesting that the pipeline lacks sufficient provenance information.
